source: Fender Tone Master Pro Model Guide 1.8 (OM_2274900000_Tone-Master-Pro-Model-Guide-H_EN), firmware 1.8.45, Pro Control 1.8.2

field_notes.block_id: Firmware-internal ACD_* FenderId. CONFIRMED against the Pro Control 1.8.2 desktop app's embedded fenderId->displayNames table (authoritative; 361 records). null only for the 7 microphones. EVH 5150III 50W 6L6 channels (ACD_HypersonicAmp6L6*) have engine records but NO display-name records.
field_notes.block_name: Exact Fender public model name as printed in the Model Guide H.
field_notes.real_unit: Real-world hardware the model emulates, per Guide H prose + firmware RE. 'Fender original' = Fender-designed, no third-party unit.
field_notes.pro_control_name: Official UI name (name32) from the Pro Control 1.8.2 app's display-name table; null for mics.
field_notes.image: Block artwork extracted from Pro Control 1.8.2 (assets.rcc). null = no tile for that block.
